title: CHILD WELFARE SERVICES - 211info
text: CORVALLIS CHILD WELFARE OFFICE CHILD WELFARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 4170 SW Research Way Suite 100 Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: ODHS resource parents, adoptive parents, and kinship providers certified with ODHS Child Welfare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed on major holidays (541) 757-4121 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 757-4121 Abuse Reporting Line (855) 503-7233 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Recruits, trains, and supports foster and kinship caregivers. Provides resources and connections, including support groups for resource providers, adoptive parents, and kinship caregivers. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adoption Services Family Preservation Programs Foster Home Placement Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD ABUSE REPORTING MUTUAL SUPPORT - FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CORVALLIS CHILD WELFARE OFFICE
